title: cenchrus caninus
intro: Cenchrus caninus, also known as the dog's tail grass or buffalo grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus caninus include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus caninus include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are made by drying and processing the plant material into a usable form.
